---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behaviour
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Send request '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages verbatim.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python | e.g. 3.12.3 |
| Node | e.g. 22.1.0 |
| Docker | e.g. 27.0.3 |
| Deployment | Local / Docker / Railway |

## Logs

```
Paste relevant logs here. Remove any credentials before posting.
```

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — recent changes, related issues, etc.
